data.name: Lainie

weaponImprint.name: Perihelion
weaponImprint.trait: After attacking a target whose defense is 0 or lower, deals 1 point of fixed stability damage.
weaponImprint.effect:
Effect Name: Tip of the Umbrella

Active Physical attacks ignore 20%/24%/28%/32%/36%/40% of the targets defense. If other allies have this effect, ignore an additional 15%/17%/19%/21%/23%/25% of the target's defense. Does not stack.

Dandegate Note: The phase "If other allies have this effect" means the ally needs to have this particular weapon effect "Tip of the Umbrella" to get the additional defense ignore. When this weapon is equipped by Lainie, her Simulacrum gains the same weapon effect "Tip of the Umbrella" since Lainie and her Simulacrum share the same equipment. This weapon does NOT provide defense ignore to her allies unlike Yoohee's Elite Weapon.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Damage dealt to targets with defense-type debuff is increased by 2.5%. Damage dealt to PMC units is increased by 2.5%.

data.effects: A Doll "reborn" from her neural records who is a cheerful little sun while also being a strong and resolute warrior. Though her appearance and personality appear unchanged, Lainie knows that her simulated past isn't her whole life and that her future holds infinite possibilities. The vast blanks in her mind are just waiting to be filled with new experiences. She cherishes the memories she does have of Leva, you and everyone else. "Commander, come bask in the sun today~"

skills.name: Perplexed Reflex
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 7 tiles, dealing Physical damage equal to 80% of attack. After using this attack, Lainie will immediately use the basic attack [dollSkill:1456dfce-577f-4eb5-9143-db03ad539888] on the target.

summon.name: Simulacrum
summon.unitInfo:
A clone of Lainie that can be independently controlled. Inherits all of Lainie's stats and equipment effects.

When either Lainie or [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] performs an active attack, the other will automatically execute the corresponding active attack on the same target. If the automatic execution fails, the other will retain one use of that corresponding skill on its action. This effect cannot be triggered repeatedly.

skills.name: Victory Protocol
skills.description: Select one enemy target within 7 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it. If [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] is on the field, [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] will immediately use the basic attack [skillsummon:d0c6e2f0-c724-4371-a75b-1b1ef341c95c] on the target after usage of this skill.

skills.name: Precognition Awareness
skills.description:
For every 12 points of initial max HP, critical rate is increased by 0.1%, to a maximum increase of 30%.

Applies [effect:4ca4072a-4ee0-4238-aff1-ca461fb8f5e2] to all enemy units within 7 tiles.

Before making an active attack, applies 1 stack of [effect:9e711b41-da91-429b-a300-e217f32afb16] to the target. If the target's defense if 0 or lower, the damage multiplier is increased by 10% of Simulacrum's initial max HP. After making an active attack, this unit cannot perform any more active attacks during this allied turn.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
For every 6 points of initial max HP, critical rate is increased by 0.1%, to a maximum increase of 60%.

Applies [effect:4ca4072a-4ee0-4238-aff1-ca461fb8f5e2] to all enemy units within 7 tiles.

Before making an active attack, applies 1 stack of [effect:9e711b41-da91-429b-a300-e217f32afb16] to the target. If the target's defense if 0 or lower, the damage multiplier is increased by 20% of Simulacrum's initial max HP. After making an active attack, this unit cannot perform any more active attacks during this allied turn.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
For every 6 points of initial max HP, critical rate is increased by 0.1%, to a maximum increase of 60%.

Applies [effect:4ca4072a-4ee0-4238-aff1-ca461fb8f5e2] to all enemy units within 7 tiles.

Before making an active attack, applies 1 stack of [effect:9e711b41-da91-429b-a300-e217f32afb16] to the target. If the target's defense if 0 or lower, the damage multiplier is increased by 30% of Simulacrum's initial max HP. After making an active attack, this unit cannot perform any more active attacks during this allied turn.

summon.name: Simulacrum
summon.unitInfo:
A clone of Lainie that can be independently controlled. Inherits all of Lainie's stats and equipment effects.

When either Lainie or [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] performs an active attack, the other will automatically execute the corresponding active attack on the same target. If the automatic execution fails, the other will retain one use of that corresponding skill on its action. This effect cannot be triggered repeatedly.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
The skill effects of Lainie and [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] are changed: For every 6 points of initial maximum HP, critical rate is increased by 0.1%, to a maximum increase of 60%.

When attacking targets with 0 or lower defense, the boost in the damage multiplier is increased to 20% of initial max HP.

The defense reduction for [effect:4ca4072a-4ee0-4238-aff1-ca461fb8f5e2] and [effect:6da68274-d8c4-46be-ad1d-26609055f355] is increased to 20%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
The skill effects of Lainie and [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] are changed: When attacking targets with 0 or lower defense, the boost in the damage multiplier is increased to 30% of Lainie's initial max HP.

When [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] is on the field, Lainie does not die even when she takes fatal damage. Instead, she recovers HP equal to 100% of max HP. This effect can only be triggered once per battle. After it is triggered, [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] vanishes.

skills.description:

If the target's defense if 0 or lower, the damage multiplier is increased by 10% of Lainie's initial max HP and gains an additional 1 point of Confectance Index. After making an active attack, Lainie, cannot perform any more active attacks during this allied turn.

skills.name: Combat Algorithm
skills.description:
Selects one enemy target within 7 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 140% of attack. After this skill is used, it cannot be used again until the end of the next allied turn.

If [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] is on the field, [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] will immediately use the active skill [skillsummon:4f518e69-5842-47b0-9865-3bcaea78f4c0] centered on herself after usage of this skill. If it does not hit any targets that were hit by [dollSkill:62ee3836-5b24-4fc9-ad3c-ac19ba8def67], it ignores 30% of the target's defense.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Selects one enemy target within 7 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 140% of attack. If the enemy target's defense is 0 or lower, critical damage dealt to its is increased by 10%. Before the attack resolves, applies 1 stack of [effect:9e711b41-da91-429b-a300-e217f32afb16] to the target. After this skill is used, it cannot be used again until the end of the next allied turn.

If [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] is on the field, [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] will immediately use the active skill [skillsummon:4f518e69-5842-47b0-9865-3bcaea78f4c0] centered on herself after usage of this skill. If it does not hit any targets that were hit by [dollSkill:62ee3836-5b24-4fc9-ad3c-ac19ba8def67], it ignores 50% of the target's defense.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Selects one enemy target within 7 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 160% of attack. If the enemy target's defense is 0 or lower, critical damage dealt to its is increased by 10%. Before the attack resolves, applies 1 stack of [effect:9e711b41-da91-429b-a300-e217f32afb16] to the target.

If [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] is on the field, [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] will immediately use the active skill [skillsummon:4f518e69-5842-47b0-9865-3bcaea78f4c0] centered on herself after usage of this skill. If it does not hit any targets that were hit by [dollSkill:62ee3836-5b24-4fc9-ad3c-ac19ba8def67], it ignores 50% of the target's defense.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
The skill effects of Lainie and [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] are changed: The amount of defense ignored for this skill as well as Lainie - Simulacrum's corresponding skill are both increased to 50%. If the enemy target's defense is 0 or lower, critical damage dealt to it is increased by 10%.

Before the attack resolves, applies 1 stack of [effect:9e711b41-da91-429b-a300-e217f32afb16] to the target.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: The skill effects of Lainie and [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] are changed: The damage multiplier for this skill as well as Lainie - Simulacrum's corresponding skills are both increased to 160% of attack. The minimum damage multiplier of Simulacrum's active skill [skillsummon:4f518e69-5842-47b0-9865-3bcaea78f4c0] is increased to 100% of attack. The restriction preventing active skill use until the end of the next allied turn is removed.

skills.name: Offense Simulation
skills.description:
Selects one enemy target within 7 tiles and deals AoE Physical damage that ignores cover damage reduction equal to 140% of attack to the target and all enemies units within 3 tiles of it. For every additional target hit, the damage multiplier is reduced by 20%, to a minimum damage multiplier of 80%.

After this skill is used, it cannot be used again until the end of the next allied turn.

After using this skill, Lainie will immediately use the active skill [dollSkill:62ee3836-5b24-4fc9-ad3c-ac19ba8def67]on the selected target.

If an enemy target's defense is 0 or lower, Lainie's active skill [dollSkill:62ee3836-5b24-4fc9-ad3c-ac19ba8def67] ignores 30% of the target's defense during this turn.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Selects one enemy target within 7 tiles and deals AoE Physical damage that ignores cover damage reduction equal to 140% of attack to the target and all enemies units within 3 tiles of it. For every additional target hit, the damage multiplier is reduced by 20%, to a minimum damage multiplier of 80%.

Before the attack resolves, additionally applies 1 stack of [effect:9e711b41-da91-429b-a300-e217f32afb16] to the target.

After this skill is used, it cannot be used again until the end of the next allied turn.

After using this skill, Lainie will immediately use the active skill [dollSkill:62ee3836-5b24-4fc9-ad3c-ac19ba8def67]on the selected target.

If an enemy target's defense is 0 or lower, critical damage dealt to it is increased by 10%. In addition, Lainie's active skill [dollSkill:62ee3836-5b24-4fc9-ad3c-ac19ba8def67] ignores 50% of the target's defense during this turn.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Selects one enemy target within 7 tiles and deals AoE Physical damage that ignores cover damage reduction equal to 160% of attack to the target and all enemies units within 3 tiles of it. For every additional target hit, the damage multiplier is reduced by 20%, to a minimum damage multiplier of 100%.

Before the attack resolves, additionally applies 1 stack of [effect:9e711b41-da91-429b-a300-e217f32afb16] to the target.

After using this skill, Lainie will immediately use the active skill [dollSkill:62ee3836-5b24-4fc9-ad3c-ac19ba8def67]on the selected target.

If an enemy target's defense is 0 or lower, critical damage dealt to it is increased by 10%. In addition, Lainie's active skill [dollSkill:62ee3836-5b24-4fc9-ad3c-ac19ba8def67] ignores 50% of the target's defense during this turn.

skills.name: Computational Crush
skills.description:
Selects one tile within 7 tiles and deals AoE Physical damage equal to 120% of attack to all enemies within 3 tiles of it. After this skill is used, it cannot be used again until the end of the next allied turn.

If [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] is on the field, after using this skill, [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] will immediately use the active skill [skillsummon:c9ffdd7a-0c85-4249-b62a-8dd44c0e1cdd] centered on herself and applies [effect:b5436492-f032-4296-aa06-a92ff2b03a3f] to the target for 2 turns.

skills.name: Hashrate Overclock
skills.description:
Selects one empty tile within 7 tiles and deals AoE Physical damage equal to 120% of attack to all enemy units within 3 tiles of it. After this skill is used, it cannot be used again until the end of the next allied turn.

If 2 or fewer enemy units are hit by this skill, stability damage dealy by Lainie's active skill [dollSkill:1a277e85-2e1a-402b-b407-9d2fb1147793] is increased by 5 points on this turn. After using this skill, Lainie will use her active skill [dollSkill:1a277e85-2e1a-402b-b407-9d2fb1147793] on the selected tile.

summon.unitInfo:

When either Lainie or [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] performs an active attack, the other will automatically execute the corresponding active attack on the same target. If the automatic execution fails, the other will retain one use of that corresponding skill on its action. This effect cannot be triggered repeatedly.

A clone of Lainie that can be independently controlled. Inherits all of Lainie's stats and equipment effects.

If the automatic execution fails, the other will retain one use of that corresponding skill on its action. This effect cannot be triggered repeatedly.

skills.name: Simulated Partner
skills.description:
Selects one empty tile within 7 tiles and summons 1 [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365].

Lainie applies [effect:4a3b840e-3d85-4798-9ae1-d90dff17be7b] to herself and her [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] for 1 round. At the end of the round, Lainie expends 3 points of Confectance Index. If Lainie does not have enough Confectance Index, her [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] vanishes. This skill cannot be used when [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] is on the field.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Selects one empty tile within 7 tiles and summons 1 [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365].

Applies 2 stacks of [effect:9e711b41-da91-429b-a300-e217f32afb16] to all enemy targets within 3 tiles of the selected tile and recovers 3 points of Confectance Index.

Lainie applies [effect:4a3b840e-3d85-4798-9ae1-d90dff17be7b] to herself and her [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] for 1 round. At the end of the round, Lainie expends 2 points of Confectance Index. If Lainie does not have enough Confectance Index, her [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] vanishes. This skill cannot be used when [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] is on the field.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Selects one empty tile within 7 tiles and summons 1 [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365].

Applies 2 stacks of [effect:9e711b41-da91-429b-a300-e217f32afb16] to all enemy targets within 3 tiles of the selected tile and recovers 3 points of Confectance Index.

Lainie applies [effect:4a3b840e-3d85-4798-9ae1-d90dff17be7b] to herself and her [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] for 1 round. When Lainie or her Simulacrum deals damage to enemy target whose defense is 0 or lower, the other gains [effect:15ccb35e-1139-49ec-8a96-8fec283dfabe]. At the end of the round, Lainie expends 2 points of Confectance Index. If Lainie does not have enough Confectance Index, her [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] vanishes. This skill cannot be used when [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] is on the field.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Cooldown is reduced by 1 turn and Confectance Index expended to maintain the [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] is reduced by 1 point. Maximum amount of stacks for [effect:9e711b41-da91-429b-a300-e217f32afb16] is increased to 6. Applies 2 stacks of [effect:9e711b41-da91-429b-a300-e217f32afb16] on all enemy units within 3 tiles of the selected tile and recovers 3 points of Confectance Index.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: When Lainie or her [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] deals damage to enemy targets whose defense is 0 or lower, the other gains [effect:15ccb35e-1139-49ec-8a96-8fec283dfabe]. The effects of [effect:4a3b840e-3d85-4798-9ae1-d90dff17be7b] is changed: The Stability damage boost is increased to 6 points.

keys.displayTitle: Affinity Key - A Space For Myself

keys.effect: Damage dealt to enemy units with 0 or lower defense is increased by 10%.

The effects of [effect:9e711b41-da91-429b-a300-e217f32afb16] is improved: defense reduction is further increased by 6%.

When Lainie uses [dollSkill:1456dfce-577f-4eb5-9143-db03ad539888], [dollSkill:62ee3836-5b24-4fc9-ad3c-ac19ba8def67], or [dollSkill:1a277e85-2e1a-402b-b407-9d2fb1147793], or when her Simulacrum uses [skillsummon:d0c6e2f0-c724-4371-a75b-1b1ef341c95c], [skillsummon:4f518e69-5842-47b0-9865-3bcaea78f4c0], or [skillsummon:c9ffdd7a-0c85-4249-b62a-8dd44c0e1cdd], for each point of Confectance Index Lainie possesses, critical damage dealt by Lainie and her Simulacrum is increased by 15%.

While her Simulacrum is alive, the mobility of Lainie and her Simulacrum is increased by 2 tiles.
When Lainie or her [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] is healed, they heal the other for 20% of max HP. This effect will not loop.

When either Lainie uses the active skill [dollSkill:1a277e85-2e1a-402b-b407-9d2fb1147793] or her Simulacrum uses the active skill [skillsummon:c9ffdd7a-0c85-4249-b62a-8dd44c0e1cdd], the other will knock the target back by 2 tiles after executing their command.
keys.displayTitle: Fixed Key 2 - Bad Stuff, Go Away!

keys.effect: At the end of the allied turn, if Lainie and her [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] are more than or equal to 3 tiles apart, both of them gain [effect:8b7a6308-b2c6-4520-bdde-760b5bd12404] for 1 turn.

When the [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] vanishes, resets the cooldown of the Ultimate Skill [dollSkill:31689e4f-5fbc-4d41-be57-3726c52e97f5]. This effect can only trigger once per battle.

When Lainie or her [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] uses [dollSkill:62ee3836-5b24-4fc9-ad3c-ac19ba8def67] or [skillsummon:4f518e69-5842-47b0-9865-3bcaea78f4c0] respectively, if the target's defense is 0 or lower, randomly cleanses 1 buff from it.
Critical damage dealt to enemy units with 0 or lower defense is increased by 5%.

vertebrae.effect: Cooldown is reduced by 1 turn and Confectance Index expended to maintain the [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] is reduced by 1 point. Maximum amount of stacks for [effect:9e711b41-da91-429b-a300-e217f32afb16] is increased to 6. Applies 2 stacks of [effect:9e711b41-da91-429b-a300-e217f32afb16] on all enemy units within 3 tiles of the selected tile and recovers 3 points of Confectance Index.

doll.name: Lainie
doll.effects: A Doll "reborn" from her neural records who is a cheerful little sun while also being a strong and resolute warrior. Though her appearance and personality appear unchanged, Lainie knows that her simulated past isn't her whole life and that her future holds infinite possibilities. The vast blanks in her mind are just waiting to be filled with new experiences. She cherishes the memories she does have of Leva, you and everyone else. "Commander, come bask in the sun today~"

skillsLevel2.name: Simulated Partner
skillsLevel2.description:
Selects one empty tile within 7 tiles and summons 1 [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365].

Lainie applies [effect:4a3b840e-3d85-4798-9ae1-d90dff17be7b] to herself and her [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] for 1 round. doll.name: Lainie
doll.effects: A Doll "reborn" from her neural records who is a cheerful little sun while also being a strong and resolute warrior. Though her appearance and personality appear unchanged, Lainie knows that her simulated past isn't her whole life and that her future holds infinite possibilities. The vast blanks in her mind are just waiting to be filled with new experiences. She cherishes the memories she does have of Leva, you and everyone else. "Commander, come bask in the sun today~"

skillsLevel2.description:
Selects one enemy target within 7 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 140% of attack. After this skill is used, it cannot be used again until the end of the next allied turn.

skillsLevel2.name: Offense Simulation
skillsLevel2.description:
Selects one enemy target within 7 tiles and deals AoE Physical damage that ignores cover damage reduction equal to 140% of attack to the target and all enemies units within 3 tiles of it. For every additional target hit, the damage multiplier is reduced by 20%, to a minimum damage multiplier of 80%.

After this skill is used, it cannot be used again until the end of the next allied turn.

After using this skill, Lainie will immediately use the active skill [dollSkill:62ee3836-5b24-4fc9-ad3c-ac19ba8def67]on the selected target.

If an enemy target's defense is 0 or lower, Lainie's active skill [dollSkill:62ee3836-5b24-4fc9-ad3c-ac19ba8def67] ignores 30% of the target's defense during this turn.

After this skill is used, it cannot be used again until the end of the next allied turn.

After using this skill, Lainie will immediately use the active skill [dollSkill:62ee3836-5b24-4fc9-ad3c-ac19ba8def67]on the selected target.

If an enemy target's defense is 0 or lower, critical damage dealt to it is increased by 10%. In addition, Lainie's active skill [dollSkill:62ee3836-5b24-4fc9-ad3c-ac19ba8def67] ignores 50% of the target's defense during this turn.

summons.name: Simulacrum
summons.unitInfo:
A clone of Lainie that can be independently controlled. Inherits all of Lainie's stats and equipment effects.

When either Lainie or [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] performs an active attack, the other will automatically execute the corresponding active attack on the same target. If the automatic execution fails, the other will retain one use of that corresponding skill on its action. This effect cannot be triggered repeatedly.

skills.name: Perplexed Reflex
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 7 tiles, dealing Physical damage equal to 80% of attack. After using this attack, Lainie will immediately use the basic attack [dollSkill:1456dfce-577f-4eb5-9143-db03ad539888] on the target.

skills.name: Hashrate Overclock
skills.description:
Selects one empty tile within 7 tiles and deals AoE Physical damage equal to 120% of attack to all enemy units within 3 tiles of it. After this skill is used, it cannot be used again until the end of the next allied turn.

If 2 or fewer enemy units are hit by this skill, stability damage dealy by Lainie's active skill [dollSkill:1a277e85-2e1a-402b-b407-9d2fb1147793] is increased by 5 points on this turn. After using this skill, Lainie will use her active skill [dollSkill:1a277e85-2e1a-402b-b407-9d2fb1147793] on the selected tile.

skills.name: Precognition Awareness
skills.description:
For every 12 points of initial max HP, critical rate is increased by 0.1%, to a maximum increase of 30%.

Applies [effect:4ca4072a-4ee0-4238-aff1-ca461fb8f5e2] to all enemy units within 7 tiles.

Before making an active attack, applies 1 stack of [effect:9e711b41-da91-429b-a300-e217f32afb16] to the target. If the target's defense if 0 or lower, the damage multiplier is increased by 10% of Simulacrum's initial max HP. After making an active attack, this unit cannot perform any more active attacks during this allied turn.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
For every 6 points of initial max HP, critical rate is increased by 0.1%, to a maximum increase of 60%.

Applies [effect:4ca4072a-4ee0-4238-aff1-ca461fb8f5e2] to all enemy units within 7 tiles.

Before making an active attack, applies 1 stack of [effect:9e711b41-da91-429b-a300-e217f32afb16] to the target. If the target's defense if 0 or lower, the damage multiplier is increased by 20% of Simulacrum's initial max HP. After making an active attack, this unit cannot perform any more active attacks during this allied turn.
skills.descriptionLevel3:

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
The skill effects of Lainie and [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] are changed: For every 6 points of initial maximum HP, critical rate is increased by 0.1%, to a maximum increase of 60%.

When attacking targets with 0 or lower defense, the boost in the damage multiplier is increased to 20% of initial max HP.

The defense reduction for [effect:4ca4072a-4ee0-4238-aff1-ca461fb8f5e2] and [effect:6da68274-d8c4-46be-ad1d-26609055f355] is increased to 20%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
The skill effects of Lainie and [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] are changed: When attacking targets with 0 or lower defense, the boost in the damage multiplier is increased to 30% of Lainie's initial max HP.

When [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] is on the field, Lainie does not die even when she takes fatal damage. Instead, she recovers HP equal to 100% of max HP. This effect can only be triggered once per battle. After it is triggered, [summon:a08dc1d8-105d-4c68-9c89-5955138f6365] vanishes.
